title: wedelia oblonga
intro: Wedelia oblonga, also known as the flowering spurge or white flowered spurge, is a flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Wedelia oblonga include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and improve digestion. Wedelia oblonga can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and ointments, making it a versatile and valuable addition to traditional medicine.
